	 Pronunciation 
	Zhang Jue 


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chang Chüeh or Chiao

	 Other Names 
	Zhang Jiao, Zhang Jao, Lord of Heaven

	 Name Notes 
	Written ‘Zhang Jiao’ (角 can be pronounced as both Jue and Jiao) at times (particularly by Koei) and as Zhang Jao in Destiny of an Emperor. The audio file says “Zhang Zue”, followed by “Jiao3”

full_text:
Zhang Jue 張角
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Jue (張角). Founder of the Yellow Scarves. Self-titled ‘Lord of Heaven’. Zhang Jue was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Zhang Jue lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
